Place_Value_Rounding_Estimation.Level_1: Whole numbers to 10,000; identify place value; round to nearest 10, 100, 1000
Place_Value_Rounding_Estimation.Level_2: Large whole numbers; decimals to 2dp; rounding decimals
Place_Value_Rounding_Estimation.Level_4: Upper and lower bounds from rounding; interval notation for bounds
Place_Value_Rounding_Estimation.Level_5: Error intervals and rounding within calculations

Addition_Subtraction.Level_1: Single and multi-digit whole numbers with regrouping
Addition_Subtraction.Level_2: Decimals to 2dp; mixed whole and decimal numbers
Addition_Subtraction.Level_3: Integers including negatives; subtracting negatives; sign rules
Addition_Subtraction.Level_4: Mixed integers, decimals, and fractions in expressions
Addition_Subtraction.Level_5: Real numbers including indices and signed values

Multiplication_Division.Level_4: Integers with negatives; long division with decimals

Order_of_Operations.Level_5: Expressions including indices and negative values

Factors_and_Multiples.Level_4: Use prime factorisation to find HCF and LCM
Factors_and_Multiples.Level_5: LCM and HCF in applied contexts

Fractions.Level_3: Multiply and divide fractions including mixed numbers
Fractions.Level_4: Fraction of a fraction; proportional fraction reasoning
Fractions.Level_5: Midpoint (mean) of two fractions; fraction scaling with unknowns

Decimals.Level_1: Convert between fractions and terminating decimals
Decimals.Level_4: Decimal expressions with indices and standard form

Percentages.Level_1: Convert between fraction, decimal and percentage
Percentages.Level_5: Successive percentage change using multiplicative factors

Ratios.Level_2: Divide quantities in a given ratio

Rates_and_Unit_Rates.Level_3: Compare value using common unit rate
Rates_and_Unit_Rates.Level_4: Convert between units (e.g., km/h to m/s)

Proportion.Level_3: Solve for total from fractional or percentage parts

Index_Laws.Level_1: Positive integer powers; squares and cubes
Index_Laws.Level_3: Power of a power; zero index

Standard_Form.Level_3: Multiply and divide in standard form
Standard_Form.Level_4: Add and subtract in standard form

Ordering_and_Absolute_Value.Level_1: Order integers on a number line
